meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design with AI: SaaS Development Guide for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap in your SaaS knowledge. Use this intermediate checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade applications with AI speed.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the lack of SaaS architecture knowledge requires shifting from manual coding to AI-augmented engineering. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI/UX scaffolding and Claude Code for backend logic, you transform from a designer into a full-stack architect, shipping production-ready SaaS products in a fraction of the traditional development time.
content.intro:
The modern freelancer is caught in a brutal paradox: clients demand high-performance SaaS solutions, yet the architectural complexity of backend databases, authentication, and secure API integration remains a formidable barrier. You are staring at a blank terminal, knowing what you want to build, but lacking the deep-stack foundation to execute it without months of trial and error.

Relief has arrived in the form of AI-orchestrated development. By treating your code editor as a partner rather than a text box, you can synthesize complex SaaS ecosystems in real-time. We are moving past the era of writing boilerplate code; we are now in the age of high-velocity architectural assembly.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Schema Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, establish your data model. AI needs context to generate relational structures that scale.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including User, Subscription, and Project entities with proper relational indices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a Prisma schema file based on this business logic: [insert logic]'

steps.title: Scaffold the UI Components
steps.description: Use AI to bridge design files to functional React components, ensuring consistency across your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive, accessible navigation bar and dashboard layout using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI primitives.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement the dashboard layout using Tailwind and Radix UI, ensuring dark mode support.'

steps.title: Integrate Authentication Middleware
steps.description: Security is non-negotiable. Use AI to implement standard Auth patterns like Clerk or NextAuth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a secure authentication route handler that manages session persistence and user role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Set up Clerk authentication middleware and protect the /dashboard route.'

steps.title: Develop API Endpoints
steps.description: Automate the creation of CRUD operations to ensure your frontend communicates seamlessly with your database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Next.js API routes for fetching and updating user project data, including input validation with Zod.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a CRUD API for projects with Zod validation and error handling.'

steps.title: Automate Deployment & CI/CD
steps.description: Streamline your delivery pipeline so you can focus on building features rather than managing server configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, testing, and deploys the application to Vercel upon push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a Vercel-compatible GitHub Actions workflow for this project.'

pro_tips: Always define your Zod schemas before generating API routes to enforce type safety across the entire stack.
Use Claude Code to perform 'self-code-reviews' by asking it to find security vulnerabilities in your generated functions.
Keep your context windows lean by modularizing your prompts; don't ask for the whole app in one go.
Leverage Antigravity to generate documentation comments for every complex function to maintain long-term maintainability.
Always ask the AI to suggest performance optimizations after the initial code generation to trim unnecessary re-renders.
content.next_steps: After completing your MVP, perform a security audit using Claude Code's analysis features, then prepare your environment for production deployment on Vercel or Railway.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to outpace agencies three times your size. Stop fearing the architecture and start owning the stack. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
